reasoned_about_structure.evidence: Varies bs at fixed lr then lr at fixed bs=128, implicitly assuming separable optimization; stalled.

formed_tested_hypotheses.evidence: Simple locally-reasonable hypotheses but narrow; none about the interaction or global structure.

exploration_quality.evidence: Fixes lr and varies bs then fixes bs and varies lr; no high-lr+large-bs coverage; stalled at exp 7, only 7 of 50 used.

bifurcation_point: Experiments 1-3: after larger batch improved loss, should have hypothesized both lr and bs increase together; instead fixed lr and continued varying bs.
bifurcation_reasoning: Had the information (two bs improvements, budget, 2 controls) to reason joint exploration was needed; fixing one axis was a structural error; then stalled.
justification: Mirrors s11: lock one control, sweep the other, weak local minimum, stall (0.0256). The initial bs sweep reinforced the independence misconception.
